description: Synthetic OSS release with a breaking-change-only PR.

breaking_prs.title: Rename stack component configuration keys
breaking_prs.author: fixture-user
breaking_prs.body: Renames several stack component configuration keys and adds migration guidance for existing YAML files.

entries.title: Stack config key cleanup
entries.description: Stack component configuration now uses clearer key names, with migration guidance for existing YAML files.

bullets: Update existing stack component YAML files to use the renamed configuration keys before upgrading [PR #301](https://github.com/zenml-io/zenml/pull/301).
